title: Why We Exist
description: ENS (Ethereum Name Service) was a significant improvement for interacting with blockchain addresses. Previously, wallet addresses were composed of long, complex strings of numbers and letters, creating a significant barrier to user adoption in the Web3 world. ENS introduced the ability to use human-readable names (like yourname.eth) making blockchain interactions much more intuitive and accessible. This transformation was crucial in shaping our understanding of digital identities within the Web3 world.
